Corresponding assay: Heterologous expression assay measuring glycerol permeability in keratinocyte-derived cell systems
Rationale for intervention: AQP3 activation → increased glycerol transport → improved epidermal hydration and barrier elasticity → reduced appearance of fine lines

Corresponding assay: Collagen degradation assay using recombinant human MMP1 enzyme
Rationale for intervention: MMP1 inhibition → reduced collagen breakdown → preservation of dermal matrix integrity → anti-wrinkle support

Corresponding assay: Human dermal fibroblast COL1A1 expression assay measured via qPCR or ELISA
Rationale for intervention: COL1A1 upregulation → increased collagen synthesis → improved firmness and elasticity

Corresponding assay: Keratinocyte HAS2 transcription assay measured via RT-qPCR
Rationale for intervention: HAS2 activation → increased hyaluronic acid production → enhanced moisture retention and skin plumpness
